title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2026
summary:
Main
Dalian iron ore futures exhibited a volatile but firm upward trend today, with the most-traded I2605 contractconcluding the session at 819 RMB per tonne, marking a 0.92% increase from the prior trading day. In the physical market, spot prices registered a modest gain of approximately 1-2 RMB. Trading houses were reasonably active in offering quotes, whereas steel mills maintained a cautious approach to procurement, resulting in subdued transaction volumes.
